creator: anatoly.borodin@gmail.com
text:
shells/mksh doesn't install, the problem may be in the Ports infrastructure.

# cd /usr/ports/shells/mksh && make install
..
===>  Installing for mksh-r32
pkg-install: Can't open pkg-install: No such file or directory
*** Error code 2

Stop in /usr/ports/shells/mksh.

# ls /usr/ports/shells/mksh/pkg-*install
2 -rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel  - 506 Jul 22  2006 /usr/ports/shells/mksh/pkg-deinstall
2 -rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel  - 405 Aug  4  2007 /usr/ports/shells/mksh/pkg-install

# vim Makefile
pre-install:
        pwd
        @${SETENV} PKG_PREFIX="${PREFIX}" PKG_DESTDIR="${DESTDIR}" \
                ${SH} ${PKGINSTALL} ${PKGNAME} PRE-INSTALL

post-install:
        pwd
        @${SETENV} PKG_PREFIX="${PREFIX}" PKG_DESTDIR="${DESTDIR}" \
                ${SH} ${PKGINSTALL} ${PKGNAME} POST-INSTALL

# make install
===>  Installing for mksh-r32
pwd
/usr/obj/usr/ports/shells/mksh
pkg-install: Can't open pkg-install: No such file or directory
*** Error code 2

Stop in /usr/ports/shells/mksh.

How-To-Repeat: # cd /usr/ports/shells/mksh && env -i make install
